title: project-rules
description: Schema for project-rules.json — operator-supplied project context given to agents.

tech_stack.description: Technology stack details. All fields are optional.

frontend.description: Frontend framework or technology (e.g. React, Vue, Next.js).

backend.description: Backend framework or technology (e.g. FastAPI, Django, Express).

deploy.description: Deployment platform or method (e.g. Fly.io, AWS ECS, Vercel).

scope.description: File-level scoping rules that tell agents what they may and must not touch.

files_in_scope.description: Glob patterns or paths that agents are allowed to modify.

files_excluded.description: Glob patterns or paths that agents must never modify.

shared_files.description: Files shared across projects or services; agents should treat these as read-only unless explicitly permitted.

conventions.description: Coding and workflow conventions that agents must follow.

tests_required.description: If true, agents must include or update tests for every code change.

simplest_first.description: If true, agents should prefer the simplest possible solution before adding complexity.

custom.description: Operator-defined extension fields. Any additional key-value pairs are allowed here.
